name: upp-umk
description: Build, run, and manage U++ (Ultimate++) assemblies and packages via the umk command-line tool

upp.activeInstallation.description: Path to the active U++ source tree (directory containing uppsrc/, umk.exe). Set via UPP: Select U++ Source Tree.

upp.installationsPaths.description: Directories to scan for upp-* U++ source trees. Use ~ for home directory.

upp.installationsGlob.description: Optional glob pattern to filter directories when scanning for U++ source trees (e.g. upp-*, upp*, ultimatepp*). Leave empty to match any directory containing uppsrc/.

upp.installationsManual.description: U++ source tree directories with addedManually flag. Items with addedManually=true are preserved across scans.

upp.enabledAssemblies.description: List of .var file paths that are enabled. Only enabled assemblies appear in the packages table. Managed via the Source Trees panel.

upp.scannedAssemblies.description: List of all .var file paths found during the last scan. Used to restore scan results when the Source Trees panel is reopened.

upp.varDir.description: Directory containing U++ .var assembly files. Defaults: Linux ~/.config/u++/theide/, macOS ~/Library/Application Support/U++/theide/, Windows %APPDATA%\U++\theide\.

upp.scanDirs.description: Directories to recursively scan for .var assembly files. Use ~ for home directory. Use the 'Scan for .var Files' button in the Source Trees panel to trigger a scan.

upp.workspacesDir.description: Directory containing .code-workspace files. When an assembly is selected, the extension looks for a matching <assemblyName>.code-workspace here, then falls back to any workspace whose folders overlap the assembly nests, then to opening the first nest dir directly.

upp.umkPath.description: Path to the umk executable. Defaults to 'umk' (must be on $PATH).

upp.buildMethod.description: Build method name (e.g. GCC, CLANG, CLANGx64) searched in ~/.config/u++/theide/, or a direct path to a .bm file. On non-Windows, this defaults to CLANG at activation.

upp.buildFlags.description: Combined build flags without the leading dash (e.g. 'r' for release, 'br' for blitz+release, 'v' for verbose). Default is debug mode with full debug info. The 's' and 'S' flags are controlled by upp.linkMode — do not include them here.

upp.linkMode.description: Library linking mode. 'all-static' = link everything statically (default). 'use-shared' = use shared libraries (-s). 'all-shared' = use shared and build as shared (-S).

upp.configurationFlag.description: Compilation +FLAGs passed to umk (e.g. 'GUI,MT'). Passed as +FLAG,FLAG.

upp.configAliases.description: User-defined aliases for config flags. Keys are raw flag strings (e.g. 'GUI,MT'), values are display names (e.g. 'Desktop GUI').

upp.cppStandard.description: Override the C++ standard for IntelliSense (e.g. 'c++17', 'c++20'). Leave empty to use the platform default.

upp.cppStandardOptions.description: List of C++ standard options shown in the sidebar dropdown.

upp.guiMode.description: GUI vs console mode. 'auto' derives from the .upp mainconfig, 'gui' always passes +GUI, 'console' omits it.

upp.runArgs.description: Extra arguments appended after the executable when running (e.g. '--log-level=debug').

upp.runCwd.description: Working directory for the run process. Leave empty to use the workspace root.

upp.runEnv.description: Environment variables for the run process, one per line in KEY=VALUE format.

upp.terminalApp.description: Terminal emulator to run programs in. Leave empty to auto-detect ($TERMINAL, $TERM_PROGRAM, XDG settings on Linux; %COMSPEC% on Windows). Ignored when the integrated terminal is used.

upp.useIntegratedTerminal.description: Run programs in VS Code's integrated terminal instead of an external emulator. Auto-enabled on headless/remote (no display server). Best for code-server / VPS. Overrides upp.terminalApp.

upp.outPath.description: Override output file or directory. Passed as the 'out' argument to umk.

upp.activeAssembly.description: Path to the active .var assembly file (set via UPP: Select Active Assembly).

upp.activeMainPackage.description: Main package within the active assembly (set via UPP: Select Active Assembly).

upp.buildCommand.markdownDescription:
The full UMK build command. Auto-generated when you select an assembly/package — edit freely to override. Example:
```
umk myapp MyApp/Main GCC -br +GUI,MT
```

upp.debugCommand.markdownDescription:
The full UMK debug build command. Auto-generated from buildCommand with release flag removed. Used by the Debug action.
```
umk myapp MyApp/Main GCC -bsH8 +GUI,X11
```

upp.releaseCommand.markdownDescription:
The full UMK release build command. Auto-generated from buildCommand with release flag added. Used for release builds.
```
umk myapp MyApp/Main GCC -brsH8 +GUI,X11
```

upp.stopOnErrors.description: When enabled, halt the build immediately on the first error.

upp.autoPackageSwitchWorkspace.description: Automatically switch to a new .code-workspace when selecting a package. When disabled, shows a Switch / Stay prompt.

upp.workspacesDirPrompted.description: Internal flag to track whether the user has been prompted to configure a workspace directory.

upp.outputConsole.description: When to open the terminal during run. 'always' opens it immediately, 'auto' opens only on failure, 'never' leaves it closed.

upp.compileCommandsMode.description: compile_commands.json generation mode. 'auto' watches source files and regenerates on changes, 'manual' provides a command to generate on demand. Workspace setting overrides user setting.

upp.generateCompileCommands.markdownDescription:
The full UMK command for compile_commands.json generation. Auto-generated when you select an assembly/package — edit freely to override. Example:
```
umk myapp MyApp/Main CLANG -j
```

upp.outputDir.description: U++ build output directory. Defaults to ~/.cache/upp.out/ or ~/upp.out/ depending on your U++ version. Used to locate the compiled binary for debugging.

upp.outputPerAssembly.description: Mirror U++ output_per_assembly: prepend the assembly name to the output path (<out>/<assembly>/<package>/<variant>/). Default false matches umk (<out>/<package>/<variant>/). Auto-set to true when a theide installation is detected.

upp.useTarget.description: Mirror umk -u (use_target): store all target files in the same directory, omitting the <package> segment and the 'Main' flag from the variant name. Path becomes <out>/[<assembly>/]<variant>/<binary>.

upp.debuggerPath.description: Path to debugger executable (gdb or lldb-mi). Leave empty to auto-detect from the .bm file's DEBUGGER field and PATH.

upp.autoLaunchJson.description: Automatically create/update .vscode/launch.json when IntelliSense is updated (assembly/package switch, manual refresh). Set to false to disable.

upp.restartClangdAfterGenerate.description: Automatically restart the clangd language server after generating compile_commands.json. Ensures clangd picks up the new data immediately.

upp.clangdSuppress.description: Clangd diagnostic codes to suppress for U++ framework headers. These are false positives caused by U++ headers not being self-contained.

assembly.description: Assembly name or comma-separated nest dirs

mainPackage.description: Main package to build, e.g. MyApp/Main
